revision.text:
[[fr:Bizen-no-Kuni Sōjagū]][[ja:備前国総社宮]][[simple:Bizen-no-Kuni Sōjagū]][[sv:Bizen-no-Kuni Sōjagū]] {| class="infobox geography" style="width: 256px; padding: 0; font-size: 89%;" | colspan="2" style="text-align: center; font-weight: bold; font-size: 1.25em; background-color: (備前国総社宮) |- class="mergedrow" |- title="Kategori" class="mergedbottomrow" | colspan="2" style="text-align: center; background-color: [[File:Bizen-no-kuni-sōjagū haiden.jpg|link=https://sv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fil:Bizennokuni-soujag%C5%AB_haiden.jpg|250x250px|Haiden]]
Haiden
|- title="Land/länder där objektet ligger" class="mergedtoprow" ! style="white-space: nowrap; text-align: left;" |{{ill|Country|en|Country|qid=Q6256|lt=Country|1=Country}} |{{ill|Japan|en|Japan|qid=Q17|lt=Japan|1=Japan}} |- title="Region(er) där objektet ligger" class="mergedrow" ! style="white-space: nowrap; text-align: left;" |Region |{{ill|Chūgoku region|en|Chūgoku region|qid=Q127864|lt=Chūgoku|1=Chūgoku region}} |- class="mergedrow" |- class="mergedrow" style="height: 0.2em;" | colspan="2" | |- title="Lokalisering" class="mergedtoprow" ! style="white-space: nowrap; text-align: left;" |Location |Naka-ku, {{ill|Okayama|en|Okayama|qid=Q200078|lt=Okayama|1=Okayama}}, {{ill|Okayama Prefecture|en|Okayama Prefecture|qid=Q132936|lt=Okayama Prefecture|1=Okayama Prefecture}} |- title="Geografiska koordinater" class="mergedrow" | style="white-space: nowrap; text-align: left;" | - coordinates |[https://geohack.toolforge.org/geohack.php?language=sv&pagename=Bizen-no-Kuni_S%C5%8Djag%C5%AB¶ms=34.7004_N_133.9546_E_type:landmark_region:JP 34°42′01″N 133°57′17″Ö﻿ / ﻿34.7004°N 133.9546°Ö﻿ / 34.7004; 133.9546] |- class="mergedrow" |- class="mergedrow" style="height: 0.2em;" | colspan="2" | |} [[File:Bizen-no-kuni-sōjagū torii-2.jpg|right|thumb|220x220px|{{Center|Torii|qq=}}]] '''Bizen-no-Kuni Sōjagū''' (備前国総社宮) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} in Naka-ku, {{ill|Okayama|en|Okayama|qid=Q200078|lt=Okayama|1=Okayama}}, {{ill|Okayama Prefecture|en|Okayama Prefecture|qid=Q132936|lt=Okayama Prefecture|1=Okayama Prefecture}}. It is a [[Sōja shrine|sōja]] shrine, so it worships all of the gods of the {{ill|Bizen Province|en|Bizen Province|qid=Q1053688|lt=Bizen Province|1=Bizen Province}}. This is designed to make it easier for the governor of the province to worship all of the gods of the province. On the morning of February 16, 1992, the shrine burned due to {{ill|Arson|en|Arson|qid=Q327541|lt=arson|1=Arson}}. The inner shrine (honden) was rebuilt in 2010, and the outer shrine (haiden) was rebuilt in 2015.{{Cite web|date=2018-11-04|title=今後の予定|trans-title=Future Plans|url=http://www.geocities.jp/bizenksoja/sukedu.html|url-status=dead|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20181104112429/http://www.geocities.jp/bizenksoja/sukedu.html|archive-date=2018-11-04|access-date=2023-05-31|language=ja|qq=}} == Worshiped ''kami'' == * [[Ōkuninushi|Ōnamuchi no Mikoto]] * {{ill|Suseri-Hime|sv|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suseri-Hime|qq=}} * Jingikan Hasshin (The Eight Gods Worshiped in the Deity Department. ) * Bizen Province's 128 Gods (Those mentioned in Bizenkoku Jinmyōchō. ) == Pictures == File:Bizen-no-kuni-sōjagū shaden.jpg|Shaden File:Bizen-no-kuni-sōjagū honden-2.jpg|Honden File:Bizen-no-kuni-sōjagū shinmon-2.jpg|Shinmon == See Also == * Kibitsuhiko Shrine (Bizen Province Ichinomiya) * == References == {{Sōja shrines|qq=}} [[sv:Bizen-no-Kuni Sōjagū]] {{translated page|simple|Bizen-no-Kuni Sōjagū|version=9423421}} {{translated page|sv|Bizen-no-Kuni Sōjagū|version=49164698}} {{translated page|ja|備前国総社宮|version=76714590|comment=history is jawiki -> svwiki -> simplewiki -> here}} [[en:Bizen-no-Kuni Sōjagū]] {{wikidata link|Q11387324}} [[Category:Bizen Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Okayama]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Naka Ward, Okayama City]] [[Category:History of Naka Ward, Okayama City]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Okayama Prefecture]] [[Category:Sōja shrines]]
